fun plan(): MmComplianceVerdict {
    val repoContextReadme = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/README.md")
    val repoContextIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/index.md")
    val repoContextMaintenance = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val generatedRepoIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val selfVerificationPlaybook = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/playbooks/upkeep/ai-self-verification.md")
    val githubContext = readWorkflowContext("github-context")
    val reviewTarget = resolveReviewTarget(githubContext)
    val changedFiles = readGitHubChangedFiles(reviewTarget)
    val changedDiff = readGitHubDiff(reviewTarget)
    val gatherEvidenceCandidates = findFiles("/tmp/gh-aw/agent", "*mm*compliance*evidence*.json")
    val gatherEvidence = readJsonFiles(gatherEvidenceCandidates)
    val relevantContext = selectRelevantRepoContext(changedFiles, repoContextIndex, generatedRepoIndex)
    val sourceClaims = extractMmComplianceClaims(gatherEvidence)
    val sourceBackedClaims = verifyClaimsAgainstDiff(sourceClaims, changedFiles, changedDiff)
    val hotPathAssessment = assessHotPathImplications(sourceBackedClaims, engineeringPrinciples, relevantContext)
    val statefulAssessment = assessStatefulImplications(sourceBackedClaims, engineeringPrinciples, relevantContext)
    val concurrencyAssessment = assessConcurrencyAndLifetime(sourceBackedClaims, engineeringPrinciples, relevantContext)
    val evidenceQuality = judgeEvidenceCompleteness(sourceBackedClaims, hotPathAssessment, statefulAssessment, concurrencyAssessment)
    val selfCheck = runSelfVerificationChecklist(evidenceQuality, selfVerificationPlaybook)
    val verdict = buildMmComplianceVerdict(evidenceQuality, selfCheck)
    return verdict
}
